item.title:
What do builders and leaders need to learn to thrive in the Agentforce transformation? #Sponsored
A...
item.description:
What do builders and leaders need to learn to thrive in the Agentforce transformation? #Sponsored
At @Salesforce TDX, Joe Inzerillo made a clear point: we’re not just adding AI; we’re onboarding a new kind of labor.
That changes everything about how we build software. I used to design → build → test → deploy. In the agentic world, you shape behavior, not just ship code.
In this conversation (streamed on @Salesforceplus1), we break down: • Why agents aren’t traditional software • The 4-layer enterprise AI architecture • What this shift means for developers + CIOs
👉 Watch the full conversation: https://t.co/mxVeP9eDgh - https://t.co/Fs4X62pGai
Or check out our conversation on #CXOSpice https://t.co/nvd5gbZdYx
#SalesforcePartner #Agentforce #Developers #TDX26
--- @YuHelenYu | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 37
item.author: @YuHelenYu
